item.title: Aussie champions robbed of T20 World Cup moment after ‘insane’ delay for musical performance
item.description: Lord’s was emptied before the trophy presentation following one of cricket’s most baffling decisions yet.

item.title: Best lunchtime snack: Oporto drops limited-edition Porto roll and mozzarella sticks
item.description: Tastes like a slice of Europe.

item.title: Anthony Albanese apologises for Kylie Minogue ‘shag, marry, date’ comments
item.description: The PM has been accused of making a ‘mockery of Labor’s claim to be champions of women’.

item.title: Melissa George: Perth-born actress secretly welcomes fourth child aged 49 as she enjoys life in France
item.description: The TV and film actress has very quietly expanded her young family as she lives abroad.

item.title: Jessica Holmes celebrates the release of Something Sweet with her most popular apple cinnamon cake recipe
item.description: The self-taught baker shares her foolproof recipe for a simple apple cake topped with crunchy cinnamon sugar and sweet glaze.

item.title: Warm up with Chef Mel’s slow-cooked beef ragu and creamy lemon pepper polenta
item.description: The Happy Chef reveals the secrets to creating tender, flavour-packed beef ragu at home.

item.title: OTTO Sydney head chef Richard Ptacnik shares the secrets to perfect handmade raviolo
item.description: Handmade pasta, rich fillings and classic Italian flavours come together in this comforting winter dish.

item.title: WA Labor minister Paul Papalia quits politics to support family member with serious illness
item.description: The veteran MP’s resignation will trigger a cabinet shake-up and by-election.

item.title: Deadly clashes break out at prison in Negombo, Sri Lanka
item.description: The clashes began on Sunday in the Sri Lankan coastal town of Negombo.

item.title: Ally leaves Farmer Wants A Wife: Is this the end for her and farmer Dylan?
item.description: Sheep farmer Dylan made one final plea when the cameras weren’t rolling.

item.title: John Longmire among 10 to be contacted as Essendon begin process for next coach
item.description: The Bombers are casting a wide net despite all the talk being around two former players.

item.title: Countdown is on for 2026 Rugby League World Cup
item.description: The blockbuster tournament will be live and free on Seven and 7plus.

item.title: Singer Lauren Bennett dead at 36 after soaring to fame on 2010s mega hit with LMFAO
item.description: The now-disbanded group announced the death in a heartbreaking social media post.

item.title: Death toll from Venezuela quakes continues to rise as thousands remain displaced
item.description: Almost 18,000 people are still homeless more than a week after twin earthquakes struck the country’s capital and nearby coastal regions.

item.title: Hamas relinquishes control over Gaza Strip in major step towards peace with Israel
item.description: The terror group has ruled the enclave for almost two decades.

item.title: George Calombaris reveals the secret to perfect spanakopita
item.description: Learn how to master a Greek favourite as George Calombaris reveals the secrets to flaky, flavour-packed spanakopita.

item.description: ‘Devastated for him.’

item.title: Origin of space debris washing ashore on Queensland beach potentially revealed
item.description: ‘The Agency is continuing to engage with international authorities to formally confirm the launch vehicle and launching state.’

item.title: French authorities accused of Princess Diana cover-up as secret file on royal’s death to remain under lock
item.description: French authorities have been accused of ‘covering up’ what really happened to Princess Diana after shocking new details emerged about a secret file connected to her death.

item.title: Respected cricket umpire Trevor Krink mourned in WA and NT following sudden death
item.description: ‘What do you say about the person who was your everything?

item.title: Federal government report reveals which jobs are most at risk of artificial intelligence disruption
item.description: A new report has shown who is safe and who isn’t as the generative tools continue to advance.

item.title: China's nuclear missile test sparks alarm as Prime Minister Anthony Albanese visits Pacific
item.description: The launch has sent alarm bells ringing across the Pacific where Australia’s Prime Minister is on a charm offensive.

item.title: Monaco bombing suspect Anastasiia Berezovska found shot dead near Kyiv, Ukraine
item.description: The global hunt for a woman wanted over a bomb attack that targeted a Ukrainian-born tycoon has ended.

item.title: French court opens door for Marine Le Pen to run in 2027
item.description: A Paris court has upheld Marine Le Pen's conviction but shortened her ban on running for office.

item.title: Prince Harry loses privacy case against UK tabloid publisher
item.description: The Duke of Sussex was one of several high-profile figures who accused the publisher of unlawful practices.

item.title: Reform UK leader Nigel Farage quits parliament and will run again for his seat amid financial donation scrutiny
item.description: The seasoned politician has come under scrutiny for an undeclared multi-million-dollar donation.

item.title: Shocking footage captures moment of explosion in Damascus as France's Macron visits Syria
item.description: Explosions have rocked the capital as French President Emmanuel Macron met his Syrian counterpart in a landmark visit.

item.title: Evacuation orders in place as New York high-rise on verge of collapse
item.description: Mayor Zohran Mamdani said the situation is being assessed ‘minute-by-minute’.

item.description: Authorities are using nets and stun guns to catch the snakes.

item.description: ‘Those doctors ruined my little girl’s whole childhood.’

item.description: A reunion with Holly Valance, lunch at Jeremy Clarkson’s pub and a promise of ‘big meetings’ has fuelled intrigue around Pauline Hanson’s UK trip.

item.title: Spotlight | 7NEWS
item.description: The latest in Spotlight

item.title: The Morning Show: Australia's no. 1 Morning TV Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: The Morning Show with Larry Emdur and Kylie Gillies is the latest news, lifestyle, recipes, entertainment and weather. The Morning Show brings you a mix of news, entertainment, lifestyle and human interest stories - Weekdays from 9:00am across Australia.

item.title: Sunrise: Australia's No. 1 Breakfast Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: Sunrise with Natalie Barr, Matt Shirvington, Edwina Bartholomew, Sam Mac and Mark Beretta is the latest news, sport, entertainment and weather. Win with the Cash Cow. Australia's most popular brekky show - Weekdays from 5:30am, weekends from 7am on Channel 7.

item.title: US-Iran ceasefire crumbles as renewed strikes rock the Middle East
item.description: Renewed hostilities come on the final day of elaborate funeral ceremonies for Iran’s slain supreme leader.

item.title: Australian backstroke champion Kaylee McKeown out of Commonwealth Games for medical reasons
item.description: ‘It was a hard decision to make but the right one.’

item.title: Aussie duo Marc Polmans and Storm Hunter suffer crushing loss in Wimbledon mixed doubles final
item.description: The pair were on track to break a 35-year drought when it cruelly slipped away.

item.title: ‘Scared and desperate’: Hanson hits back after Coalition launches scathing attack on One Nation
item.description: Angus Taylor issued a stark warning to Australians in a major speech overnight, describing Hanson’s party as “a column of smoke”, prompting a fiery response from the One Nation leader.

item.title: France on track for World Cup glory after defeating Morocco in quarter-final
item.description: ‘I propose that the other countries combine to form a rest-of-the-world team.’

item.title: Cruz Hewitt reveals secret to his rise after blasting into Wimbledon junior semi-finals
item.description: The 17-year-old needed just 53 minutes to destroy a seeded rival and he’s now just one win away from the final.

item.title: ‘I am deeply sorry’: Telstra CEO apologises for major outage
item.description: ‘We have let our customers and Australians down... I am sorry for the impact that this has had on so many people.’

item.title: FIFA hits back against referee allegations made by Egypt but England now ‘furious’
item.description: The governing body is now dealing with a fresh World Cup controversy and the coach is ‘furious’.

item.title: Socceroos young gun Paul Okon-Engstler earns European move and Lucas Herrington could be next after World Cup debut
item.description: One breakout star’s multimillion-dollar deal leaked just after an innocent photo of another caught the eye.

item.title: Australian fuel giant suggests it may eventually phase out petrol
item.description: Selling petrol is becoming less profitable in Australia, says Ampol's CEO, but there's money to be made in electric vehicle charging.

item.title: Port Adelaide write off Sam Powell-Pepper’s season due to mental struggles with knee reconstruction
item.description: ‘We have taken it out of his hands.’

item.title: Big Bash League’s ‘unique’ Indian season opener locked in for Chennai: ‘Can’t wait’
item.description: The one-off spectacular will put a struggling franchise in the shop window.

item.title: Derryn Hinch dead: Radio broadcaster and former senator dies at 82 after health battle
item.description: The larger-than-life personality was best known for his work on the radio before pivoting into politics.

item.title: ‘Shaken’ Adelaide star Josh Worrell involved in car accident before training ahead of Gold Coast clash
item.description: The 25-year-old was caught up in the accident a day out from the Crows’ home game.

item.title: 2026 JAC Hunter PHEV priced from under $50,000
item.description: Australia has a new cheapest plug-in hybrid dual-cab ute, with newcomer JAC undercutting BYD, GWM and Ford by a considerable margin.

item.title: BYD reveals 349km/h Denza Z Coupe electric supercar
item.description: Denza has pulled the covers off the striking 1164kW Z Coupe electric supercar, backed by performance figures to make petrol-powered rivals blush.

item.title: Teenage boy arrested after 13-year-old girl found dead in western Victoria
item.description: Two adults are also assisting police with their investigation.

item.title: Skoda axes its Mazda 3 rival in Australia
item.description: The slow-selling Skoda Scala hatchback will be discontinued in Australia after model year 2026 stocks dry up.

item.title: Centrelink customers warned over scam emails
item.description: Highly convincing messages could catch users unaware. Here’s what to look out for.

item.title: Derryn Hinch’s heart-wrenching final social media posts before his death at 82
item.description: The outspoken broadcaster shared his ups and downs almost daily.

item.title: Three people charged after pursuit ends with fence crash in South Perth, drugs allegedly found in car
item.description: Officers claim a driver fled after they used lights and sirens to pull him over.

item.title: New detail emerges as Adem Yze addresses Richmond fitness guru Ben Serpell’s abrupt exit
item.description: The exasperated coach says the Tigers simply can’t afford another year with a crushing injury toll.

item.title: Neil the Seal sets off to sea after wreaking havoc and stealing hearts on Tassie shores
item.description: The one-tonne agent of chaos could pop up at another beach in coming weeks, but will otherwise likely return to the Tasmanian Peninsula next year.

item.title: SA Police dismiss triple‑0 outage death claim by Senator Kerrynne Liddle
item.description: ‘It is unfortunate their loved one’s death was placed in the public arena ...when it need not have been.’

item.title: Urgent recall issued by Snackbrands Australia for Chickadees packets due to rubber contamination
item.description: The product has been sold at major supermarkets and online.

item.title: 2027 Land Rover Defender lineup revealed with new trims and price hikes
item.description: The British automaker’s popular large off-road SUV has come in for a 27MY update, bringing a new Vertex trim and a $100,000-plus base price.

item.title: 'Worst nightmare': first native bird flu case confirmed in South Australia
item.description: Environmental groups are warning Australia's first bird flu case in a native seabird could trigger a wildlife emergency.

item.title: Remains of Adelaide missing man Michael Curnow discovered after tip-off to police
item.description: The 23-year-old was last seen in April 2025.

item.title: Ex-priest Guy Norman Hartcher blames brain injury for teenage sex hunt
item.description: The 79-year-old who said ‘there is no such thing as too young’ has argued injuries from a car accident impaired his judgment.

item.title: New Supercars leader as Cam Waters wins Townsville sprint, Broc Feeney finishes 10th
item.description: Broc Feeney’s lead at top of the championship standings is gone after a stunning result.

item.title: Honda Australia to expand lineup, with eyes on EVs, more SUVs – and perhaps a ute
item.description: Buoyed by its largest orders intake in four years, Honda is looking to expand its range with more electrified models and maybe even a dual-cab ute.
